title: Live Life Amazed
description: "Our goal should be to live life in radical amazement, to get up in the morning and look at the world in a way that takes nothing for granted.Everything is phenomenal; everything is incredible; never treat life casually. To be spiritual is to be amazed."-Rabbi Abraham Heschel
